contract_clause: NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (TEST DOCUMENT This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party
matched_standard_clause: The receiving party shall not disclose confidential information.
